item.title: Custom YOLO implementation for CPU real time face detection
item.description: Implementation details of YOLO for custom object detection on CPU.

item.title: Python for Augmented Data Generation: Building Synthetic Datasets for Machine Learning
item.description: How Python libraries help create high-quality synthetic data to improve ML models.

item.title: Building a Real-Time Video Analytics Pipeline with OpenCV and Threading
item.description: Building a real-time video analytics pipeline with OpenCV and Threading for inspection applications.

item.title: Anomaly Detection in Video Game Sprites with Autoencoders (Pytorch)
item.description: Implementation of anomaly detection using Autoencoders in Pytorch.

item.title: Difference Between YOLO and Mask R-CNN
item.description: A technical explanation of YOLO versus Mask R-CNN for object detection.

item.title: Synthetic Data Vault (SDV): A Python Library for Dataset Modeling
item.description: A deep dive into code snippets and implementation guides for synthetic data generation for defects using the Synthetic Data Vault library.

item.title: OpenCV AI Competition 2021 Highlights and Team Profiles Part 1
item.description: Showcase of OpenCV industrial inspection implementations and anomaly detection projects from the OpenCV AI competition.
